reviews.comment:
Atención con un poco de espera para servir los tan publicitados sándwiches de pan casero con manteca y jamón. Baños limpios,  reciben débito y crédito al igual que efectivo.

(Translated by Google)
Be aware that there may be a slight wait for their much-advertised homemade bread sandwiches with butter and ham. The restrooms are clean, and they accept debit, credit, and cash.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/17063090883587948659/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUM2aUxXdk1nEAE

reviews.comment:
Como siempre MUY recomendable el sandwich de jamón crudo, manteca y pan casero. Buena atención, lugar recomendable para descansar un buen rato. Gracias.

(Translated by Google)
As always, the raw ham, butter, and homemade bread sandwich is HIGHLY recommended. Excellent service, a great place to relax for a while. Thank you.

reviews.comment:
Como siempre el sandwich de jamón crudo un clásico. Podrían mejorar la atención, una sonrisa siempre vende mas....

(Translated by Google)
As always, the raw ham sandwich is a classic. They could improve the service; a smile always sells more.

reviews.comment:
Muy mala atención en el minimercado durante la mañana. La persona que estaba al frente no solo no tenía paciencia sino que no trató bien a ninguna de las personas que entraron a comprar y/o tomar y comer algo.

(Translated by Google)
Very poor service at the convenience store this morning. The person in charge not only lacked patience, but also treated none of the people who came in to shop and/or eat something.

Very good service, clean bathrooms, and free water for mate. A 10.

reviews.comment:
Maravilloso lugar, es mágico, antes de los altares y saliendo del pueblo. Las montañas cómo cortadas en sus puntas da el nombre de los altares.un lugar especial para escalar y caminar, disfrutar de los espacios y variedades de colores de las montañas, que emerguen a las costas del Río Chubut

(Translated by Google)
A wonderful, magical place, just before the altars and leaving the town. The mountains, with their jagged peaks, give the area its name. A special place for climbing and hiking, enjoying the open spaces and the variety of colors of the mountains that rise to the banks of the Chubut River.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/17063090883587948659/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNhNU8zd3JRRRAB

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
